name: Traefik
description: Cloud-native ingress controller and reverse proxy with automatic service discovery, middlewares, and a built-in dashboard. Installed via Helm into the traefik namespace; the dashboard is served under the base path /traefik and reachable at http://<host>:7554/traefik via the KubeKosh proxy.

setup_commands.command: helm repo add traefik https://traefik.github.io/charts --force-update && helm repo update traefik
setup_commands.label: Adding Traefik Helm repo

setup_commands.command:
helm upgrade --install traefik traefik/traefik --version 41.0.0 --namespace traefik --create-namespace --wait --timeout 5m -f - <<'EOF'
image:
  tag: "v${VERSION}"
service:
  spec:
    type: ClusterIP
api:
  dashboard: true
  basePath: /traefik
ingressRoute:
  dashboard:
    enabled: true
    matchRule: PathPrefix(`/traefik`)
    entryPoints:
      - web
EOF
setup_commands.label: Installing Traefik
